title: Allergy Symptoms 过敏症状
scene: Lily身上起红疹子去看医生。

lines.en: Doctor, I have red spots all over my arms.
lines.zh: 医生，我手臂上全是红疹子。

lines.en: This morning. They are very itchy.
Did you eat anything new or go anywhere yesterday?
lines.zh: 你昨天吃了什么新东西或者去了哪里？

lines.en: I went to the park. There were many flowers.
lines.zh: 我去了公园。那里有很多花。

lines.en: You might be allergic to pollen. It is spring.
lines.zh: 你可能对花粉过敏。现在是春天。

lines.en: Take this allergy medicine once a day.
lines.zh: 这抗过敏药每天吃一次。

lines.en: Yes, in a few days. Try to stay away from flowers.
lines.zh: 会的，过几天就好。尽量远离花。
